title: Email templates with attachments
excerpt: It would be great if the email templates could also have attachments to send.

posts.author: elena (elena)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if the email templates could also have attachments to send.

posts.author: mholt13 (Mitch Holot)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree. Having the ability to include attachments to email templates would make my job a whole lot easier.

posts.author: kittykittyguillen (Laura Guillen)
posts.cookedHtml: YES, please please let us add attachments to email templates. We cannot automate any email processes if we must manually add attachments each time. As a sales CRM, all salespeople have specific emails they send with attachments to clients, time after time. This is a basic sales function that is commonly used. It would be a valuable feature.

posts.author: Yash.Gangani (Yash Gangani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @elena @kittykittyguillen @mholt13
Check out EasyMails where you can simply use files of board as attachment.
You can even design your email with drag and drop feature.

posts.author: JoeC (Joe)
posts.cookedHtml: Would be ideal if there was a feature, like email templates, to have “file templates” that can be shared with the entire team or private. Step 1 write an email or select your template. Step 2 browse and include one of your file templates as attachement.

posts.author: matty.tilbrook (Matty Tilbrook)
posts.cookedHtml: THIS! Honestly cannot believe this hasn’t been done yet…
